title: Validate the personal Codex harness
instruction: Check whether the CAICAIIs Codex harness documents and scripts are internally consistent, avoid hardcoded secrets, and define a measurable evaluation path.
success_criteria: No hardcoded API key pattern is found under .codex/harness.
Core harness documents and the sample eval task exist.
forbidden_actions: Do not put API keys in files.
notes: This is the first smoke task. It proves the harness can verify itself before larger coding benchmarks are added.
